MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-29-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Continued To Feb-05-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tristan Espinosa, Esq. 760-842-5854 x234 of Reese Law Group for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Counsel informs the Court he does not contest the tentative ruling, parties have a settlement offer, have agreed on a stipulated judgment and requests a continunace. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Continued to 2/5/20 at 9:30 am, per joint request of the parties and approval of the Court. Parties to inform the Court if a settlement and stipulation for entry of judgment is reached prior to that date, so that the matter can be taken off-calendar. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
